notes: Keeps the mobile/PWA Pathmark branding metadata from v0.6.37.
Replaces the continuous appearance polling loop with an event-based theme check.
Checks the active Streamlit appearance once on load, then checks again only when Streamlit app-shell theme attributes/styles or the OS colour scheme changes.
Keeps seasonal Pathmark themes as Summer, Autumn, Winter and Spring while applying the light or dark variant based on Streamlit Light/Dark/System.
Retains the manual Refresh theme display fallback in Settings.
release_notes: Keeps mobile branding metadata while replacing the continuous appearance watcher with a safer event-based theme-change check.
label: Event-based theme change repair
